title: erythroxylum bicolor
intro: Erythroxylum bicolor, also known as the "African coca," is a plant species that belongs to the Erythroxylum genus, native to tropical Africa. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Erythroxylum bicolor include relief from headaches, arthritis, and other pain-related conditions. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are typically dried and used to make teas or infusions, which are then consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
